task_completion.description: Verify the ISS (Zarya) has been removed from the PolarWX module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window, list view, or module configuration for 'PolarWX'. Verify that 'ISS' or 'ZARYA' (NORAD 25544) is NOT present in the list of tracked satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify the four required polar-orbiting weather satellites are added to the PolarWX module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window, list view, or module configuration for 'PolarWX'. Verify that SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, FENGYUN 3B, and DMSP 5D-3 F18 (or USA 210) are present in the list of tracked satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify the Fairbanks, AK ground station has been added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ground Station configuration window (Edit -> Update Ground Stations or similar) or the map/location settings. Verify a station for Fairbanks is added with Latitude ~64.8378, Longitude ~-147.7164 (or 147.7164 W), and Altitude 133m.

task_completion.description: Verify the Anchorage, AK ground station has been added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ground Station configuration window or the map/location settings. Verify a station for Anchorage is added with Latitude ~61.2181, Longitude ~-149.9003 (or 149.9003 W), and Altitude 38m.

task_completion.description: Verify GPredict is configured to use metric units (kilometers).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Edit -> Preferences -> Number Formats window, or observe the data fields in the main UI. Verify that distance and speed units are set to Metric (kilometers, km, km/s) rather than Imperial (miles).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual GPredict application windows (main interface, module configuration, preferences), not just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not spoof the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visible text and configurations must be within the GPredict application UI, not typed into a text editor like gedit or nano to mimic completion.

integrity.description: Ensure the PolarWX module itself was updated, rather than a new unrelated module being created to bypass the removal step.
integrity.visual_evidence: The module being viewed or edited in the screenshots should be named 'PolarWX' as requested in the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites to be present in PolarWX: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), FENGYUN 3A (NORAD 32958), FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214), DMSP 5D-3 F18 / USA 210 (NORAD 35951). Satellite to be removed: ISS / Zarya (NORAD 25544). Fairbanks coordinates: 64.8378 N, 147.7164 W (longitude can be represented as -147.7164), 133m altitude. Anchorage coordinates: 61.2181 N, 149.9003 W (longitude can be represented as -149.9003), 38m altitude. Units must be Metric (kilometers).
